unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved Changes
unsavedChanges.message: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close without saving?

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize how the application looks and feels.

language.label: Language
language.helper: Choose your preferred language. Browser Default follows your system language.

chatBubbleFontSize.label: Chat bubble font size
chatBubbleFontSize.helper: Choose the default font size used in chat bubbles across the app.

taskExecution.title: Default Coding Agent
taskExecution.description: Choose the default coding agent for tasks.

executor.label: Default Agent Configuration
executor.helper: Choose the default agent configuration to use when creating a task attempt.

type.label: Editor Type
type.helper: Choose your preferred code editor interface.

customCommand.label: Custom Editor Command
customCommand.helper: Enter the command to launch your custom editor. This will be used to open files.

host.label: Remote SSH Host (Optional)
host.helper: Set this if openteams is running on a remote server. When set, clicking "Open in Editor" will generate a URL to open your editor via SSH instead of spawning a local command.

user.label: Remote SSH User (Optional)
user.helper: SSH username for the remote connection. If not set, VS Code will use your SSH config or prompt you.

cliSetup.title: GitHub CLI Setup
cliSetup.description: GitHub CLI authentication is required to create pull requests and interact with GitHub repositories.

steps.checkInstalled: Check if GitHub CLI (gh) is installed
steps.installHomebrew: Install it via Homebrew if needed (macOS)

cliSetup.setupNote: The setup will run in the chat window. You'll need to complete the authentication in your browser.

errors.brewMissing: Homebrew is not installed. Install it to enable automatic setup.
errors.notSupported: Automatic setup is not supported on this platform. Install GitHub CLI manually.
errors.setupFailed: Failed to run GitHub CLI setup.

homebrew.description: Automatic installation requires Homebrew. Install Homebrew from
homebrew.manualInstall: and then rerun the setup. Alternatively, install GitHub CLI manually with:

manual.andAuthenticate: and then authenticate with your GitHub account.

branchPrefix.label: Branch Prefix
branchPrefix.helper: Prefix for auto-generated branch names. Leave empty for no prefix.

workspaceDir.label: Workspace Directory
workspaceDir.helper: Workspaces will be created in a .vibe-kanban-workspaces subdirectory within this path. Leave empty to use the system default. Changes require an app restart.
workspaceDir.dialogDescription: Choose a directory. Workspaces will be created in a .vibe-kanban-workspaces subdirectory within it.

autoDescription.label: Auto-generate PR description by default
autoDescription.helper: When enabled, the AI agent will automatically update the PR title and description after creation.

customPrompt.helper: Custom prompt for the AI agent when generating PR descriptions. Use {pr_number} and {pr_url} as placeholders.

commits.title: Commits
commits.description: Configure commit behavior for task attempts

reminder.label: Commit reminder
reminder.helper: Prompt supported agents to commit changes before stopping.

customPrompt.helper: Custom prompt for the commit reminder. The git status will be appended automatically.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Control when and how you receive notifications.

sound.label: Sound Notifications
sound.helper: Play a sound when task attempts finish running.
sound.fileHelper: Choose the sound to play when tasks complete. Click the volume button to preview.

push.label: Push Notifications
push.helper: Show system notifications when task attempts finish running.

messageInput.title: Message Input
messageInput.description: Configure how messages are sent in the chat input.

shortcut.label: Send message with
shortcut.helper: Choose the keyboard shortcut to send messages.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Help improve openteams by sharing anonymous usage data.

telemetry.label: Enable Telemetry
telemetry.helper: Enables anonymous usage events tracking to help improve the application. No prompts or project information are collected.

taskTemplates.title: Tags
taskTemplates.description: Create reusable text snippets that can be inserted into task descriptions using @tag_name.

manager.title: Task Tags
manager.noTags: No tags yet. Create reusable text snippets for common task descriptions. Use @tag_name in any task.
manager.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the tag "{{tagName}}"?

tagName.label: Tag Name
tagName.hint: Use this name with @ in task descriptions: @{{tagName}}
tagName.error: Tag name cannot contain spaces. Use underscores instead (e.g., my_tag)

content.label: Content
content.hint: Text that will be inserted when you use @{{tagName}} in task descriptions
content.placeholder: Enter the text that will be inserted when you use this tag

safety.title: Safety & Disclaimers
safety.description: Reset acknowledgments for safety warnings and onboarding.

beta.title: Beta Features
beta.description: Try out experimental features before they're released.

workspaces.label: Enable Workspaces Beta
workspaces.helper: Use the new workspaces interface when viewing task attempts. Tasks will open in task view first, and attempts will open in the new workspaces view.

chatCompression.title: Chat History Compression
chatCompression.description: Configure compression strategy for long conversations.

tokenThreshold.label: Token Threshold
tokenThreshold.helper: Trigger compression when total tokens exceed this value (default: 50,000).

compressionPercentage.label: Compression Percentage
compressionPercentage.helper: Percentage of messages to compress when threshold is exceeded (default: 25%).

maxDepth.label: Maximum chain depth
maxDepth.helper: Limits automatic @mentions to prevent loops. Default: 8. When the limit is reached, further agent mentions stop running automatically.

agents.title: Coding Agent Configurations
agents.description: Customize the behavior of coding agents with different configurations.

availability.loginDetectedTooltip: Recent authentication credentials found for this agent
availability.installationFoundTooltip: Agent configuration found. You may need to log in to use it.

errors.deleteFailed: Failed to delete configuration. Please try again.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save agent configurations. Please try again.
errors.saveConfigFailed: Failed to save configuration. Please try again.
errors.schemaNotFound: Schema not found for executor type: {{executor}}

tree.selectConfig: Select a configuration from the sidebar to view and edit its settings.

deleteConfigDialog.title: Delete Configuration?
deleteConfigDialog.description: This will permanently remove "{{configName}}" from the {{executorType}} executor. You can't undo this action.

cli.title: Service Providers
cli.description: Manage the built-in CLI provider, model, and runtime behavior settings.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Choose the active provider and configure credentials or custom endpoints.
provider.label: Default provider
provider.helper: The built-in CLI will use this provider by default.
provider.apiKeyMasked: Saved keys are masked. Leave the value unchanged to keep the existing key.
provider.endpointHelper: Leave empty to use the provider default endpoint.

model.title: Model
model.description: Select the default model for the current provider.
model.selectHelper: Choose the default model from the available list.
model.loadError: Failed to load models for this provider.
model.empty: No default model is available for this provider.

behavior.title: Behavior
behavior.description: Configure runtime defaults for the CLI executor.
behavior.autoApproveHelper: Automatically approve supported actions when the CLI executor allows it.
behavior.autoCompactHelper: Automatically compact long conversations when the CLI executor supports it.

validation.title: Connection test
validation.description: Verify the current provider configuration before saving.
validation.error: Failed to test the provider connection.
validation.missingApiKey: Enter an API key before testing the connection.
validation.unsupportedCustom: Custom Provider validation is not implemented in the backend yet.
validation.unsupportedOllama: Ollama validation is currently unavailable because the backend validate endpoint still requires an API key.

status.title: Status
status.description: This route is ready, but configuration APIs are not available yet. TASK-F2 and TASK-F3 will continue once the backend endpoints are ready.

planned.title: Planned configuration areas
planned.description: The full page will be implemented on top of the upcoming backend APIs.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Select the default provider and configure credentials or custom endpoints.

model.title: Model
model.description: Choose the model list returned by the provider and keep defaults consistent.

behavior.title: Behavior
behavior.description: Control approval, compaction, and other CLI runtime preferences.

readiness.title: Current readiness
readiness.description: What is available now versus what still depends on the backend.
readiness.routeReady: The `/settings/cli` route and Settings navigation entry are available now.
readiness.apiPending: CLI config read/write hooks are blocked until `GET/PUT /config/cli` and provider-related APIs are ready.
readiness.uiPending: The interactive form, validation, loading, and error states will be delivered in TASK-F3.

customProviders.title: Custom Providers
customProviders.description: Manage custom provider entries that sync directly to the openteams-cli configuration.

empty.title: No custom providers yet
empty.description: Create a provider to sync custom endpoints and model metadata into openteams-cli.

list.noModels: No models configured for this provider yet.

feedback.deleteFailed: Failed to delete the custom provider.

form.createDescription: Add a provider entry that will be written into the openteams-cli config.
form.editDescription: Update the provider entry and its model metadata.
form.idHelper: Used as the unique provider key in openteams-cli. It cannot be changed after creation.
form.apiKeyMasked: Saved keys stay masked. Leave the value unchanged to keep the existing key.
form.npmHelper: Optional. Leave empty to use the default SDK.
form.modelsDescription: Define the model catalog that openteams-cli should expose for this provider.
form.fetchSuccess: Fetched {{count}} models and added {{added}} new models.
form.fetchFailed: Failed to fetch models for this provider.
form.noDiscoveredModels: No models were returned by this provider.
form.autoUnsupported: The current SDK type does not support automatic model fetching or testing yet. You can continue configuring models manually.
form.authFailed: Authentication failed. Check the API key and the authentication method required by this SDK type.
form.submitError: Failed to save the custom provider.

validation.modelIdRequired: Every model entry needs a model ID.
validation.numericLimit: Limits and timeout must be non-negative integers.
validation.modelNameRequired: Every model entry needs a model name.
validation.thinkingBudgetRequired: Enter the thinking budget tokens when thinking is enabled.

form.thinkingHelper: Enable thinking mode for this model.

deleteDialog.title: Delete custom provider?
deleteDialog.description: This will permanently remove "{{id}}" and its models from the CLI configuration.

mcp.title: MCP Server Configuration
mcp.description: Configure Model Context Protocol servers to extend coding agent capabilities with custom tools and resources.

labels.agentHelper: Choose which agent to configure MCP servers for.
labels.serverHelper: Click a card to insert that MCP Server into the JSON above.

errors.applyFailed: Failed to apply MCP server configuration
errors.supportMessage: To use MCP servers, please select a different executor that supports MCP (Claude, Amp, Gemini, Codex, or Opencode) above.

repos.title: Repository Configuration
repos.description: Configure scripts that run when this repository is used in workspaces.

selector.label: Select Repository
selector.helper: Select a repository to view and edit its configuration.

displayName.label: Display Name
displayName.helper: A friendly name for this repository.

defaultWorkingDir.label: Default Working Directory
defaultWorkingDir.helper: Subdirectory relative to the repository root where the coding agent runs for single-repo workspaces. Set when the workspace is created. Leave empty to use the repository root.

defaultTargetBranch.label: Default Target Branch
defaultTargetBranch.helper: The default base branch for new workspaces. Worktrees branch off from this branch and PRs will target it.

scripts.title: Scripts & Configuration
scripts.description: Configure dev server, setup, cleanup, and copy files for this repository. These scripts run whenever the repository is used in any workspace.

setup.label: Setup Script
setup.helper: This script runs from within the worktree after it's created and before the coding agent starts. Use it for setup tasks like installing dependencies or preparing the environment.
setup.parallelLabel: Run setup script in parallel with coding agent
setup.parallelHelper: When enabled, the setup script runs simultaneously with the coding agent instead of waiting for setup to complete first.

cleanup.label: Cleanup Script
cleanup.helper: This script runs from within the worktree after coding agent execution, only if changes were made. Use it for quality assurance tasks like running linters, formatters, tests, or other validation steps.

archive.label: Archive Script
archive.helper: This script runs from within the worktree when the workspace is archived. Use it for cleanup tasks like stopping services, releasing resources, or saving state.

copyFiles.label: Copy Files
copyFiles.helper: Comma-separated list of files to copy from the original repository directory to the worktree. Useful for environment files like .env. Make sure these are gitignored!
copyFiles.placeholder: File paths or glob patterns (e.g., .env, config/*.json)

devServer.label: Dev Server Script
devServer.helper: Starts a development server for this repository. Scripts execute from within the repository's worktree directory.

save.confirmSwitch: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to switch repositories? Your changes will be lost.

presets.title: Preset Templates
presets.description: Manage reusable AI member and team templates for chat sessions.

members.empty: No member presets. Add one to get started.

fields.name: Name
fields.runnerTypePlaceholder: Leave empty to use session default
fields.recommendedModelPlaceholder: Leave empty to use executor default
fields.systemPromptPlaceholder: Describe this AI member's role settings...

errors.toolsJsonObject: Tools JSON must be an object.

teams.empty: No team presets. Add one to get started.
teams.noMemberPresets: No member presets available. Create member presets first.

fields.name: Team Name
fields.leadAgentDescription: The member responsible for generating execution plans in workflow mode. Defaults to the first member if not set.

steps.installHomebrew: Install it via Homebrew if needed (macOS)

members.title: Member Templates
members.description: Create and manage AI member preset templates. Use them to quickly add pre-configured AI members to your chat sessions.
members.empty: No member presets yet. Create one to get started!

fields.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g., Backend Engineer for API development
fields.runnerTypePlaceholder: e.g., claude_code, leave empty for default
fields.systemPromptPlaceholder: Describe this AI member's role settings...

teams.title: Team Templates
teams.description: Create and manage AI team preset templates. Import entire teams of pre-configured AI members with one click.
teams.empty: No team presets yet. Create one to get started!
